bvp_comparison.production_description: Solved by the Aristotle automated theorem prover (Harmonic) via the `aristotle` CLI v1.0.1, with submission orchestration by Kim Morrison. The proof was generated against Aristotle's default Lean v4.28.0 / Mathlib v4.28.0 target; submitted here against the benchmark's pinned Lean v4.30.0-rc2 + pinned Mathlib commit. Comparator's verdict applies — proofs that exploit features added to Mathlib after v4.28.0 will compile; those that rely on tactic behaviour that changed are at the mercy of forward compatibility.
